description: This file exports a function that returns SQL migration scripts for creating and managing 'documents' and 'extracted_text' tables, as well as a view 'document_extracted_text' in a MySQL database. It handles backward compatibility and conditional creation of tables and views using dynamic SQL and prepared statements.

methods.name: getMigrationSql
methods.description: Returns SQL statements for creating and managing 'documents' and 'extracted_text' tables and a view in MySQL.
